chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Welcome back aliens my name is Avin20 and let's continue with the series on Python and

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: in this video we will talk about loops.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Now what exactly loop means?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Now in programming what you do is you sometimes you need to repeat the statements.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Example let's say you have written 5 statements and maybe you want to repeat them.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: How will you repeat them?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Of course there is one way you can copy paste the same code multiple times.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Example let's say I want to print telescope.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So I want to print telescope once and if I run this code of course it will print only

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: once.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: What if I want to print telescope 2 times?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So what we can do is we can just copy paste it.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So we are good with this.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So I will copy paste it and we got 2 telescopes and if I run this code you can see we got

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: 2 telescopes.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: That's working.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: What if I want to print telescope 10 times?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: What you will do now?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Of course you can copy paste it 10 times.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: But don't you think you are doing manual work?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: What if I want to print 1000 times?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: It will be difficult to do that right?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Now the best way to do it is applying a loop.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: What you can do here is you can say hey python I want to repeat the same statement multiple

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: times.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: To do that we can use loops.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: And we can use 2 type of loops.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: One is called as while loop and second is called as for loop.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Let's focus on while here.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So we can use a while.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So while is a keyword and then you have to specify the condition.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: See while will say ok my job is to repeat this statement multiple times but then tell

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: me for how much time you want to do that.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: I will say ok do it for 5 times.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: But how will I do that?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So when you say you want to do it for 5 times we count right?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: We need a counter here.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Example if I say hey you say hello 5 times.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: I am talking to you here ok.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So say hello 5 times.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: What you will do is in your mind you will be saying hello once ok hello second time

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: hello hello and hello.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So you have a counter there right?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: In the same way we need a counter here.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: For that I will be using a variable called as i and I will say i starts with 1 and then

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: every time ok first of all you have to check right?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: How will I check?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: If the value of i is less than equal to 5.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Ok we have to apply a condition right?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So step 1 would be take a counter a variable which is i in this case and check if the value

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: of i is less than 5 and every time you print the disco just increment the value of i right?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So because you are doing it here right?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So you are saying hello hello.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So you are incrementing the value.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So you will say i is equal to i plus 1.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: That's it.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: It's so simple.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: And remember the syntax.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So we have to use a while then we have to specify the condition and a colon.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Now this colon specifies whatever is coming ahead is a part of this block.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: And this to statement belongs to the same suit.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Because we are using a proper indentation here.

chunks.text: And now let me just run this code and you can see we got the disco 5 times.

chunks.text: And remember this we are using while inside a while.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: But look at the jump.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: It is not jumping outside.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: It's not jumping back to this loop.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: It is jumping back to the inner loop because first it will complete the inner loop then

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: it will go back to the outer loop.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Right.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: It is something like you know we have seven days a week and each day has 24 hours.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Right.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So you can imagine the number of days is the outer loop and the number of hours is the

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: inner loop.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Right.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So what it means.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Let's say if you start with Sunday.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: Now when you complete the entire 24 hours it will go for the new day which is Monday

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: in this case.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: On Monday as well we have the same hours right 0th hour 1th hour.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So that means every time you change your day it will restart the number of counting for

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: your hours.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So it will first complete the hours.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So if I say F8 again it prints rocks.

chunks.text: And that's why you can see if you see the output we got one telescope but two time rocks.

chunks.text: OK.

chunks.text: OK.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python

chunks.text: But look at the value of J. J is five.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python

chunks.text: Now since J is five it is not continuing ahead.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: That was a mistake.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | While Loop in Python
chunks.text: So to solve this problem what we can do is first we have to do two things.
